subject: Add HTTP to DFC tests
commit_message:
Add HTTP to DFC tests

- testing environment preparation for DFC with HTTP client
- add suitable TCs for CSIT tests

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2527
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Gajewski <krzysztof.gajewski@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ic419c38125201ed6578a308ba258709f20ae65bd

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

I think you missed a carriage return - the title is a bit long.. 😊
would it be possible to plan a demo of these tests during an integration weekly meeting?
not this week as it is public holiday in Poland but maybe next week

WOuld some ofg the TC be suitable for End to End tests in CI/CD chains (in addition of functional/CSIT tests)
Patch Set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> I think you missed a carriage return - the title is a bit long.. 😊
> would it be possible to plan a demo of these tests during an integration weekly meeting?
> not this week as it is public holiday in Poland but maybe next week
> 
> WOuld some ofg the TC be suitable for End to End tests in CI/CD chains (in addition of functional/CSIT tests)

Hi Morgan, 
I've updated commit message. Hope this will be suitable. 
It would be pleasure to prepare a demo of these tests during integration weekly meeting.
Next week will be fine.
For now I'm not sure if the prepared TC will be suitable for End to End tests. There are
6 TC prepared to cover CSIT tests with HTTP. Corresponding auto-tests are in the autotests
directory, but for now I'm not sure how or if they are used in CI/CD chains.

> Ok I planned a 15 minutes slot on the 13th : https://wiki.onap.org/display/Meetings/%5Bintegration%5D+ONAP+2%2C+Wed+UTC+13%3A00

Thank you for your info.
Additionally, I have some more questions:
- I have one failed test - https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-md-lint/33/ 
  It is related to "md" files validation, but ERROR message seem to be not so informative for me:
ERROR: InvocationError for command /bin/bash -c 'coala --non-interactive --disable-caching --no-autoapply-warn md --files $(</tmp/.coalist_md) \ ' (exited with code 5)

coala help says:
5 - coala executed successfully. Results were found but patches to the results were applied successfully (http://docs.coala.io/en/latest/Users/Exit_Codes.html)

So I will expect successfully ended test or failed but with some patch file to make corrections
manually.
Additionally I saw, that just before Christmas some jenkins configuration related to this was changed (https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-md-lint/jobConfigHistory/showDiffFiles?timestamp1=2020-12-16_13-02-35&timestamp2=2021-01-04_19-03-49)

Are these two cases related? Do you have any suggestions how to solve this?

- Regarding this patchset, it could be merged before or after demo?
- Note, after merging this patchset I will do next push with csit tests to csit repo.
